diagrams.title: Group Structure Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the four fundamental properties required for a set to form a group
diagrams.purpose: Understand what makes a group - foundational concept for all group theory

diagrams.title: Cyclic Group Z₆ Visualization
diagrams.description: Circular representation showing how elements repeat after reaching order
diagrams.purpose: Visualize cyclic nature - adding 1 repeatedly cycles through all elements, demonstrating generator concept

diagrams.title: Subgroup Lattice of Cyclic Group Z₁₂
diagrams.description: Shows all subgroups arranged by inclusion, demonstrating Lagrange's theorem
diagrams.purpose: Visualize subgroup relationships and how orders (1,2,3,4,6,12) divide 12 - concrete Lagrange theorem example
